debug_info.goal:
A : Finset ℕ
N : ℕ
hAN : A ⊆ range N
hA : ThreeAPFree ↑A
⊢ ∃ c > 0, ↑A.card ≤ ↑N / exp (-c * log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹)

proof:
by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  apply le_trans (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN))
  rw [card_range N, neg_mul, one_mul, exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp [hN, log_zero]
  · nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
    rw [← exp_zero, exp_le_exp]
    apply rpow_nonneg
    exact log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hN))
failed_attempts:
by
  use 1
  constructor; · norm_num
  rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN
  · simp [hAN]
  · rw [le_div_iff (exp_pos _), exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
    apply (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans
    nth_rewrite 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    gcongr
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N
    · rw [one_le_exp]
      exact mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.one_le_of_lt hN))) _)

by
    exists 1, zero_lt_one
    rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul, ← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    gcongr
    · exact mod_cast card_le_card hAN
    · rw [← Real.exp_zero, Real.exp_le_exp]
      exact rpow_nonneg _ _

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN
  · simp [Finset.subset_empty.mp hAN]
  · rw [exp_neg, le_div_inv, ← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    gcongr
    · exact_mod_cast card_le_card hAN
    · exact one_le_exp_of_nonneg (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast hN)) _)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  cases N with
  | zero => simp [range_zero, subset_empty] at hAN; simp [hAN]
  | succ n =>
    rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
    exact (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans (le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
      (one_le_exp_iff.2 (Real.rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast n.one_le_succ)) _)))

by
  exists 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Finset.card_le_card hAN)).trans
  cases N with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n =>
    nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (n + 1 : ℝ)]
    gcongr
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg (n + 1)
    · rw [Real.one_le_exp_iff]
      exact Real.rpow_nonneg (Real.log_nonneg (by norm_cast; exact n.succ_pos)) 12⁻¹

by
  use 1
  constructor
  · norm_num
  · rw [le_div_iff (exp_pos _)]
    refine (mul_le_of_le_one_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (exp_le_one_iff.mpr ?_)).trans (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_of_subset hAN))
    simp only [neg_mul, one_mul, neg_le_zero]
    apply rpow_nonneg
    cases N; simp; apply log_nonneg; norm_cast; simp

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_of_subset hAN)).trans
  nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (Real.one_le_exp_iff.mpr (mul_nonneg zero_le_one (Real.rpow_nonneg (by
    rcases N with _|N; · simp
    exact Real.log_nonneg (Nat.one_le_cast.2 (Nat.one_le_succ N))) _))) (Nat.cast_nonneg N)

by
  use 1; refine ⟨zero_lt_one, ?_⟩
  rw [exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  calc
    ↑A.card ≤ (N : ℝ) := mod_cast card_le_card hAN
    _ ≤ ↑N * exp (log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹) := by
      nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (↑N : ℝ)]
      gcongr
      · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N
      · exact one_le_exp.mpr (rpow_nonneg (log_nat_cast_nonneg N) _)

by
  use 1
  refine ⟨by norm_num, ?_⟩
  rw [div_eq_mul_inv, exp_neg, inv_inv]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.2 (Finset.card_le_of_subset hAN)).trans
  conv_lhs => rw [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  gcongr
  rw [← exp_zero]
  gcongr
  exact mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (rpow_nonneg _ _)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [neg_mul, one_mul, Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply le_trans (by norm_cast; exact Finset.card_le_card hAN)
  cases N with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n =>
    nth_rewrite 1 [← mul_one (n + 1 : ℝ)]
    gcongr
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg (n + 1)
    · apply Real.one_le_exp
      apply Real.rpow_nonneg
      apply Real.log_nonneg
      norm_cast
      exact Nat.one_le_succ n

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul, ← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN)).trans ?_
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (Real.one_le_exp_of_nonneg ?) (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
  simp; apply Real.rpow_nonneg
  cases N; · simp; · apply Real.log_nonneg; norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ _

by
  use 1; constructor; · norm_num
  rw [le_div_iff (exp_pos _)]
  apply (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by exact_mod_cast card_le_of_subset hAN) (exp_pos _).le).trans
  rw [card_range]
  nth_rewrite 2 [← mul_1 (↑N : ℝ)]
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
  · rw [← exp_zero, exp_le_exp, neg_mul, neg_le_zero_iff]
    apply mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (rpow_nonneg (by rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN; · simp; · exact log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast hN)) _)
  · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N

by
  use 1; constructor; · norm_num
  rw [exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul, ← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (one_le_exp_iff.2 (rpow_nonneg ?_ 12⁻¹)) (Nat.cast_nonneg N))
  cases N <;> simp [log_nonneg]

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul, one_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN)).trans
  rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN
  · simp
  · apply le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
    exact one_le_exp.mpr (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast hN)) _)

by
  use 1
  refine ⟨zero_lt_one, ?_⟩
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul, one_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN)).trans
  apply le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
  apply exp_ge_one
  apply rpow_nonneg
  cases N
  · simp [log_zero]
  · apply log_nonneg
    exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_succ _

by
  refine ⟨1, zero_lt_one, (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans ?_⟩
  apply le_div_self (Nat.cast_nonneg N) (exp_pos _)
  rw [exp_le_one_iff, neg_nonpos]
  apply rpow_nonneg
  rcases N with _ | n
  · simp
  · exact Real.log_nonneg (Nat.one_le_cast.2 n.one_le_succ)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [neg_mul, one_mul, exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply le_trans (m := (N : ℝ))
  · exact Nat.cast_le.mpr ((card_le_card hAN).trans (card_range N).le)
  · apply le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
    exact one_le_exp.mpr (rpow_nonneg (log_nat_cast_nonneg N) _)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN)).trans
  rw [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
  · rw [Real.one_le_exp_iff]
    apply Real.rpow_nonneg
    rcases N with - | N
    · simp [Real.log_zero]
    · exact Real.log_nonneg (by norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ N)
  · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [neg_mul, one_mul, Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  calc
    (A.card : ℝ) ≤ (N : ℝ) := by norm_cast; exact (card_le_card hAN).trans (by rw [card_range])
    _ ≤ N * exp (log N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := by
      nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
      · apply Real.one_le_exp
        apply Real.rpow_nonneg
        cases N with
        | zero => simp
        | succ n => exact Real.log_nonneg (by norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ n)
      · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul, ← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (Nat.cast_nonneg N))
  exact one_le_exp (rpow_nonneg (by cases N; · simp [log_zero]; · exact log_nonneg (by norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ _)) _)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · subst hN; simp at hAN; simp [hAN]
  · have hN' : (1 : ℝ) ≤ N := by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN
    rw [le_div_iff (exp_pos _), ← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    refine (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Finset.card_le_of_subset hAN)) (exp_pos _).le).trans ?_
    gcongr
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N
    · rw [exp_le_one_iff]
      exact mul_nonpos_of_nonpos_of_nonneg (by norm_num) (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg hN') _)

by
  refine ⟨1, zero_lt_one, ?_⟩
  rw [exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.2 ((card_le_card hAN).trans_eq (card_range N))).trans
  apply le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
  rw [one_le_exp]
  exact mul_nonneg zero_le_one (rpow_nonneg (by cases N <;> simp [log_nonneg, one_le_cast]) _)

by
  use 1; constructor; · norm_num
  simp only [neg_mul, one_mul, Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans ?_
  cases N
  · simp [subset_empty.1 hAN]
  · refine le_mul_of_le_of_one_le le_rfl (one_le_exp_of_nonneg (Real.rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg ?_) _))
    norm_cast; norm_num

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [div_eq_mul_inv, neg_mul, one_mul, exp_neg, inv_inv]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_card hAN)).trans
  cases N
  · simp
  · apply le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
    apply one_le_exp_of_nonneg
    apply rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ _))

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [neg_mul, one_mul, exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card_of_subset hAN)).trans ?_
  nth_rewrite 1 [← mul_one ↑N]
  gcongr
  · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N
  · exact one_le_exp (rpow_nonneg _ _)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN
  · simp [Finset.subset_empty.1 hAN]
  · refine (Nat.cast_le.2 (card_le_of_subset hAN)).trans ?_
    nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    gcongr
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N
    · exact one_le_exp.2 (rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg (by norm_cast)) _)

by
  use 1; refine ⟨zero_lt_one, ?_⟩
  rw [le_div_iff (exp_pos _)]
  calc (A.card : ℝ) * exp (-1 * log N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ))
    _ ≤ A.card * 1 := mul_le_of_le_one_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (exp_le_one_iff.mpr (by
      rw [neg_mul, neg_nonpos]; exact mul_nonneg zero_le_one (rpow_nonneg (by cases N <;> simp [log_nonneg, Nat.one_le_succ]) _)))
    _ ≤ N := by norm_cast; exact card_le_card hAN.trans_eq (card_range N)

by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.mpr ((card_le_card hAN).trans_eq (card_range N))).trans ?_
  nth_rewrite 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
  gcongr
  · apply Nat.cast_nonneg
  · apply Real.one_le_exp
    apply mul_nonneg (by norm_num)
    apply Real.rpow_nonneg
    rcases N with - | n <;> simp [Real.log_nonneg, Nat.one_le_succ]

by
  use 1; constructor; · norm_num
  rw [le_div_iff (exp_pos _)]
  apply mul_le_mul (by exact_mod_cast card_le_of_subset hAN) (exp_le_one_iff.mpr ?_) (exp_pos _).le (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
  rw [neg_nonpos, one_mul]
  apply rpow_nonneg
  rcases N with - | n
  · rw [Nat.cast_zero, log_zero]
  · apply log_nonneg; norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ _

by
  use 1; refine ⟨zero_lt_one, ?_⟩
  rw [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  apply (Nat.cast_le.2 (Finset.card_le_of_subset hAN)).trans
  rcases N.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hN
  · simp
  · nth_rw 1 [← mul_1 (N : ℝ)]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
    · rw [Real.one_le_exp]
      exact mul_nonneg zero_le_one (Real.log_nonneg (Real.one_le_rpow (Nat.one_le_cast.2 hN) (by norm_num)))
    · exact Nat.cast_nonneg N

by
  use 1
  simp [Real.exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  refine (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN)).trans ?_
  exact le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg N) (Real.one_le_exp.mpr (Real.rpow_nonneg (by cases N; simp; exact Real.log_nonneg (by norm_cast; exact Nat.one_le_succ _)) _))
successful_attempts:
by
  use 1, zero_lt_one
  apply le_trans (Nat.cast_le.mpr (card_le_card hAN))
  rw [card_range N, neg_mul, one_mul, exp_neg, div_inv_eq_mul]
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · simp [hN, log_zero]
  · nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (N : ℝ)]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (Nat.cast_nonneg N)
    rw [← exp_zero, exp_le_exp]
    apply rpow_nonneg
    exact log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hN))
